description: eREVEALER (enhanced Repeated Evaluation of VariablEs conditionAL Entropy and Redundancy) is an analysis method specifically suited to find groups of genomic alterations that match in a complementary way, a predefined functional activation, dependency of drug response target profile. The method starts by considering, if available, already known genomic alterations (seed) that are the known causes or are known or assumed associated with the target. REVEALER starts by finding the genomic alteration that best matches the target profile conditional to the known seed profile using the conditional mutual information. The newly discovered alteration is then merged with the seed to form a new summary feature, and then the process repeats itself finding additional complementary alterations that explain more and more of the target profile.
author: Pablo Tamayo;Broad Institute
plan:
## eREVEALER_preprocess GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
eREVEALER_preprocess is a GenePattern module that eREVEALER (enhanced Repeated Evaluation of VariablEs conditionAL Entropy and Redundancy) is an analysis method specifically suited to find groups of genomic alterations that match in a complementary way, a predefined functional activation, dependency of drug response target profile. The method starts by considering, if available, already known genomic alterations (seed) that are the known causes or are known or assumed associated with the target. REVEALER starts by finding the genomic alteration that best matches the target profile conditional to the known seed profile using the conditional mutual information. The newly discovered alteration is then merged with the seed to form a new summary feature, and then the process repeats itself finding additional complementary alterations that explain more and more of the target profile.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 29 parameters:
- Required: none
- Optional: input_file, protein_change_identifier, col_genename, col_class, col_sample, k_size, bandwidth_multiplication, bandwidth_adjustment, neighborhood, mode, ratio, phenotype_file, class_file, class_separator, phenotype_name, file_separator, direction, frequency_threshold, weight_threshold, gene_list, name_match, sample_list, total_ratio, combine, make_figure, figure_format, if_gmt, verbose, prefix

### 3. Command Line
```
REVEALER preprocess --input_file <input_file> --protein_change_identifier <protein_change_identifier> --col_genename <col_genename> --col_class <col_class> --col_sample <col_sample> --mode <mode> --ratio <ratio> <phenotype_file>  <class_file> --prefix <prefix> --class_separator <class_separator> <phenotype_name> --file_separator <file_separator> --direction <direction> --frequency_threshold <frequency_threshold> --weight_threshold <weight_threshold> <gene_list> --name_match <name_match> --make_figure <make_figure> --figure_format <figure_format> <sample_list> --total_ratio <total_ratio> --if_gmt <if_gmt> --verbose <verbose> --k_size <k_size> --bandwidth_multiplication <bandwidth_multiplication> --bandwidth_adjustment <bandwidth_adjustment> --combine <combine> --neighborhood <neighborhood>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: yoshihiko1218/revealer\:v0.0.8

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: input_file
parameters.description: The name of the input file, can be maf file or gct file.

parameters.name: protein_change_identifier
parameters.description: Column of the protein change identifier in the dataset.

parameters.name: col_genename
parameters.description: Column of gene name information in the dataset.

parameters.name: col_class
parameters.description: Column with class information in the dataset.

parameters.name: col_sample
parameters.description: Column with sample name information in the dataset.

parameters.name: k_size
parameters.description: Size of kernel indicating k variance far from middle. Has to be int. Default is 5.

parameters.name: bandwidth_multiplication
parameters.description: Value of bandwidth multiplier. Has to be float or int. Default is 0.65.

parameters.name: bandwidth_adjustment
parameters.description: Value of bandwidth adjustment. Has to be float or int. Default is -0.95

parameters.name: neighborhood
parameters.description: This indicates number of neighborhood for kernel. Higher number will lead to higher accuracy but lower speed.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Mode, can be class, mutall, freq, weight, all, or comb. For more detail, check documentation. Default is class.

parameters.name: ratio
parameters.description: Ratio of selected features by weight that is acceptable. Default is 0.33.

parameters.name: phenotype_file
parameters.description: Name of phenotype file. Required if mode is one of freq, weight, all, or comb.

parameters.name: class_file
parameters.description: File for class to use, required if input file is gct file.

parameters.name: class_separator
parameters.description: Separator between gene name and class name. default is '_'

parameters.name: phenotype_name
parameters.description: Name of phenotypr to be used in phenotype file. Default is first row.

parameters.name: file_separator
parameters.description: Separator of file, default is tab

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Direction of phenotype the features should match. Default is positive.

parameters.name: frequency_threshold
parameters.description: Threshold for frequency. Default is 5.

parameters.name: weight_threshold
parameters.description: Threshold for weight. Default is 0.7.

parameters.name: gene_list
parameters.description: Gene Set that is extracted. File format should be txt file with single column indicating genes.

parameters.name: name_match
parameters.description: Indicate if sample name in phenotype file and input file are matching. Default is True. If false, the program will try to find matching part.

parameters.name: sample_list
parameters.description: List of sample to be used.File format should be txt file with single column indicating features.

parameters.name: total_ratio
parameters.description: Ratio of gene occrence compared to total sample number. default is 0.4

parameters.name: combine
parameters.description: If combine alleles by gene when making figures.

parameters.name: make_figure
parameters.description: Indicate if figures are created. Recommended only when you run few genes. Default is False.

parameters.name: figure_format
parameters.description: Format for figure. Can be any figure format available in matplotlib. Default is pdf.

parameters.name: if_gmt
parameters.description: Indicate if gmt file should be generated. Default is True.

parameters.name: verbose
parameters.description: Verbose level for report. Setting 0 to get no report. Default is 1.

parameters.name: prefix
parameters.description: prefix for output files. default is Mut.
